title: Recognition of Charlottetown as the Birthplace of Confederation Act
title_en: Recognition of Charlottetown as the Birthplace of Confederation Act
short_name: Recognition of Charlottetown as the B...
description: Recognition of Charlottetown as the Birthplace of Confederation Act (Recognition of Charlottetown as the B...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Recognition of Charlottetown as the Birthplace of Confederation Act .

provisions.title: Birthplace of Confederation
provisions.content: 2 Charlottetown, Prince Edward Island, is recognized as and declared to be the birthplace of Confederation.

provisions.title: Jurisdiction of the Minister
provisions.content: 3 For greater certainty, nothing in this Act constitutes a designation within the jurisdiction of the Minister responsible for the Parks Canada Agency under the Parks Canada Agency Act .
